return(function(N,t,w,K,d,n,m,k,Z,R,P,u,x,j,f,a,s,J,e,T,z,D,r)e,x,J,T,j,a,u,Z,k,s,z,R,r,f,P,D=function(N,A)local t=a(A)local w=function()return x(N,{},A,t)end return w end,function(x,w,K,d)local
